ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., Transition, Diffuse) */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site (e.g., W) */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waypoints" (
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waypoint */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the zones table */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sites table */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the waypoint */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the waypoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waypoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., SPRING, SUMMER) */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tide_times" (
  "tide_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tide time */,
  "tide_time_name" TEXT /* Name of the tide time (e.g., Low_Day, High_Day) */,
  "tide_time_description" TEXT /* Description of the tide time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tide_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the marine_environmental_data table */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marine_environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "waypoint_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the waypoints table */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the zones table */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sites table */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the seasons table */,
  "tide_time_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tide_times table */,
  "temp_in" REAL /* Inlet temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity in parts per thousand (ppt) */,
  "phosphate" REAL /* Phosphate concentration in milligrams per liter (mg/L) */,
  "silicate" REAL /* Silicate concentration in micrograms per liter (ug/L) */,
  "nn" REAL /* NN (Nitrate plus Nitrite) concentration in micrograms per liter (ug/L) */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH of the water */,
  "ta" REAL /* Total Alkalinity (TA) in micromoles per kilogram (umol/kg) */,
  "percent_sgd" REAL /* Percentage of Submarine Groundwater Discharge (SGD) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
